2606.11440.title: INFRAMIND: Infrastructure-Aware Multi-Agent Orchestration
2606.11440.paper_summary: Existing multi-agent LLM orchestration methods, ranging from brute-force ensembles to learned routers, select models and topologies based on task and model features. However, these methods do not consider the runtime state of the serving infrastructure. On shared GPU clusters under concurrent load, this infrastructure blindness causes systematic resource underutilization: preferred models accumulate deep request queues while equally capable alternatives sit idle. In multi-agent pipelines, where each query triggers multiple sequential model calls, these delays then compound across every downstream step. Closing this gap is challenging because the relevant infrastructure signals (queue depths, KV-cache pressure, latencies) are dynamic and noisy, and they must drive three different decisions: planning, per-step routing, and scheduling. We introduce INFRAMIND, a framework that makes the entire multi-agent stack infrastructure-aware. An infra-aware planner conditions topology and role selection on real-time system load and remaining budget, biasing toward simpler graphs under congestion and richer ones at low load. An infra-aware executor then observes per-model queue depths, cache utilization, and response latencies at each agent step to decide which model to call and how deeply to reason; a budget-aware scheduler further reorders each model's queue so that urgent requests are served first. Cast as a hierarchical constrained MDP and solved end-to-end via reinforcement learning, the system learns to balance quality against latency automatically. Across five benchmarks, INFRAMIND delivers up to +7.6 pp accuracy over the prior baseline at low load with up to 7x lower latency, and sustains up to 99.9% SLO compliance under high load where every baseline drops below 50%.
2606.11440.paper_summary_zh: 現有的多智能體 LLM 協調方法，從暴力集成到學習路由器，根據任務和模型特徵選擇模型和拓撲。<lb/>然而，這些方法並未考慮服務基礎設施的運行時狀態。<lb/>在共享 GPU 集群下的並發負載中，這種基礎設施盲點導致系統性資源未充分利用：首選模型積累了深度請求隊列，而同樣能夠的替代方案則閒置。<lb/>在多智能體管道中，每個查詢觸發多個連續的模型調用，這些延遲在每一步驟中進一步累積。<lb/>填補這一空白具有挑戰性，因為相關的基礎設施信號（隊列深度、KV 緩存壓力、延遲）是動態且嘈雜的，並且它們必須驅動三個不同的決策：規劃、每步路由和調度。<lb/>我們介紹了 INFRAMIND，一個使整個多智能體堆棧具備基礎設施感知的框架。<lb/>一個具備基礎設施感知的規劃器根據實時系統負載和剩餘預算對拓撲和角色選擇進行條件設定，在擁擠時偏向於較簡單的圖形，而在低負載時則偏向於較豐富的圖形。<lb/>一個具備基礎設施感知的執行器則在每個智能體步驟中觀察每個模型的隊列深度、緩存利用率和響應延遲，以決定調用哪個模型以及推理的深度；一個具備預算感知的調度器進一步重新排序每個模型的隊列，以便優先處理緊急請求。<lb/>該系統被視為一個分層約束 MDP，並通過強化學習端到端求解，自動學習在質量與延遲之間取得平衡。<lb/>在五個基準測試中，INFRAMIND 在低負載下提供了比先前基準高出 +7.6 pp 的準確度，並且延遲降低了最多 7 倍，在高負載下保持了高達 99.9% 的服務水平協議合規性，而每個基準則降至 50% 以下。
2606.11440.author: Ahasan Kabir et.al.
2606.11440.authors: Ahasan Kabir, Jiaqi Xue, Mengxin Zheng, Qian Lou
